data.title: Aecon partnership closes $609 million contract for Port of Montreal Expansion in Contrecoeur. Aecon's share is 40% of the project.
data.description: Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) revealed today that its partnership, Contrecoeur Terminal Constructors General Partnership, consisting of Aecon (40%) and Pomerleau (60%), has finished the collaborative development phase and achieved financial close on a design-build agreement with the Montreal Port Authority for the Port of Montreal Expansion in-water works project in Contrecoeur, Québec. The contract, valued at $609 million, was finalized using a progressive design-build approach. Aecon's portion of the contract will be incorporated into its Construction segment backlog in the fourth quarter of 2025.
UNI price analysis on October 09, 2025, shows a significant increase of 10%, reaching $200 per token.

data.title: Guaranteed Roof expands roofing services to North Carolina. Increased growth for residential and commercial solutions.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on October 9, 2025, Guaranteed Roof, a reputable company offering residential and commercial roofing services, revealed its official entry into the North Carolina market. The expansion aims to introduce the company's top-notch roofing services to a wider audience.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates HSII, CMA, FITB for shareholder rights violations. New York, Oct. 9, 2025.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a firm specializing in investor rights, announced it is conducting investigations into multiple companies for alleged infractions of federal securities laws and possible breaches of fiduciary responsibilities to shareholders. Among these companies is Heidrick & Struggles International, Inc. The investigations aim to ascertain any violations concerning shareholders' interests.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates CLCO, TBN, ACLS for shareholder rights violation and fiduciary breaches.
data.description: In New York on October 9, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, disclosed their investigation into several companies. Specifically, they are examining Cool Company Ltd. (NYSE: CLCO) for potential infringements of federal securities regulations and possible breaches of fiduciary responsibilities to shareholders concerning the company's sale transaction.

data.title: Serve Robotics partners with DoorDash for autonomous food delivery, the largest service in the US. - Investor's Business Daily
data.description: Serve Robotics revealed a collaboration with DoorDash, the leading food delivery platform in the United States. The partnership signifies a significant autonomous food delivery deal between the two companies. The news was officially disclosed on Thursday and was well-received by investors, with Serve Robotics being featured in a recent article by Investor's Business Daily. This collaboration is expected to enhance the efficiency of food delivery services and potentially shape the future of the industry.

data.title: Bitcoin drops below $121,400 as stocks and gold hit new peaks; Gold surged 53%, while Bitcoin gained 29%.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin has dropped below $121,400 as both stocks and precious metals have hit record highs. Gold, in particular, has seen a significant increase of 53% this year, surpassing Bitcoin's gain of 29%.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates BLBX, GES, HFWA on behalf of shareholders for potential violations of securities laws.
data.description: In New York on October 9, 2025, the law firm Halper Sadeh LLC disclosed they are scrutinizing multiple companies for potential breaches concerning federal securities laws and fiduciary responsibilities to shareholders. The inquiry includes Blackboxstocks Inc. (NASDAQ: BLBX) and involves assessing possible violations to ensure shareholder rights are safeguarded.

data.title: Rod Patterson of Crum & Forster's Seneca Insurance Company wins 2025 Corporate Leader Award.
data.description: In Morristown, New Jersey, on October 9, 2025, Crum & Forster (C&F) proudly declared Rodney (Rod) Patterson, currently the Vice President and Director of Property Claims at Seneca Insurance Company, Inc., a C&F subsidiary, as the recipient of the prestigious 2025 Corporate Leader Award.

data.title: Philippines waste recycling company One and One Green Technologies announces IPO on Nasdaq, offering 2 million shares at $5 each, raising $10 million.
data.description: San Rafael, Bulacan, Philippines, Oct. 09, 2025 - One and one Green Technologies. INC (NASDAQ: YDDL), a Philippine company specializing in waste materials and scrap metal recycling, has disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering. The offering consists of 2,000,000 class A ordinary shares valued at $5.00 per share, totaling $10,000,000 in gross proceeds. This amount is before accounting for underwriting discounts and associated expenses. Additionally, the Company has provided underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to 300,000 extra Class A Ordinary Shares to cover over-allotments, as necessary. All shares offered are from the Company.
Fed bids for 4-week bills total $298.9 mln.

data.title: SHIB ending 2025 consolidation, likely to outperform DOGE, technical indicators show. SHIB price near 0.00001350 resistance.
data.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB) is on the brink of a significant breakout after being in a consolidation phase for almost a year. Technical indicators indicate that the meme token might surpass Dogecoin (DOGE) as the market cycle progresses. The price of SHIB is currently within a bullish symmetrical triangle formation, with resistance at 0.00001350 and a rising support level around 0.00001200. The 200-day Exponential Moving Average (EMA) further reinforces this setup, hinting at an imminent increase in volatility after a prolonged period of sideways trading. If SHIB manages to break above the 0.00001350 resistance level, it could result in a substantial price surge. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: REPKON USA partners with Dyno Nobel to form Nitradyn LLC for chemical production; Dyno Nobel has global reach with thousands of employees.
data.description: REPKON USA-Chemical Technologies, LLC, a key player in designing and developing chemical manufacturing facilities, has partnered with Dyno Nobel, Inc., a subsidiary of Dyno Nobel Limited. Dyno Nobel is a global leader in explosives and energetics products, boasting a vast workforce globally. The joint venture, Nitradyn, LLC, has been established as a result of this collaboration. The partnership is set to combine the expertise of REPKON USA with the extensive resources of Dyno Nobel, promising a strong impact in the industry.

data.title: Clean Cans CFL, LLC in Orlando acquires Bin Gators in residential bin cleaning services partnership. #acquisition #Orlando #trash #recycling #powerwashing
data.description: Orlando, Florida - On October 9, 2025, Clean Cans CFL, LLC, a top provider of residential trash and recycling bin cleaning services and power washing in Central Florida, revealed their acquisition of Bin Gators, another company specializing in residential bin cleaning services. This strategic move consolidates Clean Cans' position as the premier service provider in the region.
